text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the Mejiro legacy is still fresh in people's
memories, for Mejiro Dober, the challenge of the
Twinkle Series is about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her goal is to become a strong racer who can
always run confidently, and we decide the first
step toward that goal is to leave a good
impression during her debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Mejiro Bright, a fellow member of the
Mejiro family and Mejiro Dober's peer, comes by.
Their partner running is so intense that even the
surrounding observers get riled up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching them, I'm confident that Mejiro Bright
will be a wonderful rival for Mejiro Dober. And
thus, our three years together begin!
